title: The Real Difference Between Your Choices for Selling Software Without a Stripe Account — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: If you're a creator in Nigeria, Ghana, or Pakistan, the chances of getting paid through Stripe, PayPal, Gumroad, or Payhip are slim to none. These popular platforms have strict restrictions that block sellers from these countries, leaving you with no way to sell your software and get paid. You're not alone in this struggle, and there's a solution that's been working for hundreds of blocked creators: Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle, a complete infrastructure for selling digital products without the need for a Stripe account or any payment processor account.
What Each Option Actually Offers

Stripe, PayPal, Gumroad, and Payhip are popular platforms for selling digital products, but they come with restrictive terms and conditions that often block creators from certain countries. Stripe, for example, excludes 32 countries from using its services, including Nigeria, Ghana, and Pakistan. PayPal has a similar list of restricted countries, and Gumroad and Payhip also have their own restrictions. These platforms promise a seamless payment experience, but they often come with hidden fees, account restrictions, and unpredictable payment processing times.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

When it comes to restricted countries, these platforms often have a one-size-fits-all approach that fails to account for the unique needs of creators from these countries. They may claim to offer 'alternative' payment methods or 'local' payment options, but the truth is that these solutions are often unreliable, expensive, and subject to change without notice. In contrast, Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle is designed with creators from restricted countries in mind, offering a dedicated infrastructure that bypasses these restrictions and allows you to sell your software without any hassle.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed, fees, and real costs, Stripe, PayPal, Gumroad, and Payhip often fail to deliver. They may promise fast payment processing, but in reality, payments can take days or even weeks to clear. And let's not forget the fees – hidden fees, setup fees, and transaction fees that can add up quickly. Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle, on the other hand, offers instant payment processing, zero fees, and a transparent pricing model that puts you in control of your costs.
Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle is the only platform that offers instant payment processing, zero fees, and a transparent pricing model.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

One of the biggest advantages of Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle is its automation and delivery capabilities. With our platform, you can set up automated delivery of your digital products, eliminating the need for manual intervention and reducing the risk of human error. Our platform also offers advanced analytics and reporting tools, giving you a clear picture of your sales and customer behavior.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

So which option is right for you? If you're a creator from a restricted country, Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle is the clear choice. With its dedicated infrastructure, instant payment processing, zero fees, and automation capabilities, our platform is designed to help you succeed in the digital marketplace. Don't let Stripe, PayPal, Gumroad, or Payhip hold you back – choose the Full Stack Bundle today and start selling your software with confidence.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
Our platform bypasses the restrictions of Stripe, PayPal, Gumroad, and Payhip, allowing creators from restricted countries to sell their software with confidence.
